items.body_html:
Overview

Andrej Karpathy is included because their work is useful for understanding practical AI engineering, model behavior, research translation, or production systems.

Why Follow

Excellent for builders who want first-principles explanations of transformers, tokenization, and training loops.

Notable Work

Neural network and GPT-from-scratch educational materials.
